## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do? What's getting in the way? -->
<!-- Concrete beats abstract: "I can't index a .epub file" > "knowledge base could be better" -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- If you have one. A sketch is fine — we'll iterate. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the problem. Helps us understand trade-offs. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Related issues, links, workflows that would use this. Screenshots if UI. -->

---

Before submitting:

- [ ] I searched existing issues + discussions
- [ ] This fits qwe-qwe's scope (local-first agent optimised for small models — not a cloud product, not a replacement for ChatGPT API wrappers)
- [ ] I'm OK with the maintainers rejecting or reshaping this — feature requests are conversation starters, not demands
